REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (239 Thrift St., San Francisco, Ca. 94112)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Charlene Harris.

Ms. Ng announced the terms of the sale for the record. The sale was confirmed at $375,000.00. An additional bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
